events.title: 2026 SWD Vet/Novice Mix/Match Triples
events.subtitle: Women's Sponsored
events.formatDetails: Four 12-end games, 2-bowl triples · Skip / Vice / Lead

club.name: Santa Anita Bowling Green Club
club.address: 405 S Santa Anita Ave, Arcadia, CA 91007

events.deadline: Entry deadline: Friday, April 11, 2026 (no refunds after)
rules: Teams to consist of 3 players, including at least 1 woman and 1 novice
All players must be Bowls USA members
If there are enough entries for more than 1 green, they shall be played as individual tournaments with each green having its own winners
Shirts must have sleeves and collars, no cutoffs
Teams must match colors for tops and bottoms
Bring your own lunch and water bottle — Santa Anita will provide limited hospitality
Every effort will be made to keep entry numbers even
events.noviceDefinition: A bowler who joined a club or division for the first time ever, less than two years (24 months) before the scheduled event. If you started bowling on or after April 1, 2024, you are still a novice.
events.livestreamNotice: There may be livestreaming at this event. By entering, you are consenting to be livestreamed.

contact.name: Anne Nunes
contact.mailTo: Anne Nunes, 427 Tidland Cir, Placentia, CA 92870

events.title: 2026 SWD Women's Novice Singles

club.name: Newport Harbor Lawn Bowling Club
club.address: 1550 Crown Drive, Corona Del Mar, CA 92625

events.deadline: Entry deadline: Sunday, April 12, 2026 (no refunds after)
rules: All players must be Bowls USA members
Shirts must have sleeves and collars, no cutoff bottoms
Teams must match in color of shirts and bottoms
Bring your lunch and water bottle — Newport will provide hospitality
Every effort will be made to keep entry numbers even
events.noviceDefinition: A bowler who joined a club or division for the first time ever, less than two years (24 months) before the scheduled event. If you started bowling on or after April 1, 2024, you are still a novice.
